title: Antioxidant Therapy Reverses Hepatotoxicity Induced by Microcystin-LR in a Cellular Model of Metabolic Dysfunction-Associated Steatotic Liver Disease (MASLD).
snippet: Microcystin-LR (MC-LR) is a potent hepatotoxin that has been shown to cause liver damage even at doses lower than the established Low Observable Adverse Effect Level (LOAEL) of 200 μg/kg in animal models. We have previously observed that low-dose exposure to MC-LR in animals with diet-induced Metabolic Dysfunction-Associated Steatotic Liver Disease (M...
